Context - update to showcase the case stories, much like what Mike Morse did. Move the settlements carousel down to the Picture of Sandy and Cheryl.

title: Discuss PR campaigns for Hill & Moin
description:
Cory talked in the last progress call for Hill and Moin about looking into PR options and pricing for a digital PR campaign. He’s focused on topics like labor and construction content, updates on labor laws, safety on construction sites, and injury stats to grab some media attention. 

He’ll follow up with the Hill & Moin team on our next progress call (April 16th) and show them pricing for these campaigns.

This will be different from the FAQ's on the practice area pages. These are questions that they believe customers are searching for.
